dimensions.label: Agent attribution & provenance
dimensions.detail: 1/4 commits have clear provenance (linked account, bot identity, or co-author trailer). Agent-involved share is reported as context, not judged.

dimensions.label: Recorded review coverage
dimensions.detail: 0/2 merged PRs received at least one review not authored by the PR author.

dimensions.label: Recorded review catch rate
dimensions.detail: Could not verify: no reviewed PRs in sample.

dimensions.label: Human merge gate
dimensions.detail: 1/2 sampled merges were performed by a non-bot account.

dimensions.label: Batch size
dimensions.detail: Median merged-PR diff size is 3550 lines (additions+deletions). Small batches score higher.

dimensions.label: Lead time (first commit → merge)
dimensions.detail: Median lead time from first PR commit to merge is 924h.

dimensions.label: Plan-before-code evidence
dimensions.detail: 0/2 merged PRs reference a linked issue or plan document in the PR body.

dimensions.label: Audit-trail completeness
dimensions.detail: Mean of: substantive PR description ≥120 chars (0/2), review recorded (0/2), CI checks recorded (0/2).
